html:
{% set company = frappe.get_doc("Company", doc.company) %} {% set employee = frappe.get_doc("Employee", doc.employee) %} {% set letter_head = frappe.get_doc("Letter Head", company.default_letter_head) %}
{% if letter_head.image %}
{% endif %}
Ref: {{ doc.name }} Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.offer_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}
OFFER LETTER

Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }},

With reference to the discussed job opportunity at {{ doc.company }}, we are pleased to provide you with the below employment offer in our Company on the terms and conditions set out below:

  • Position: {{ doc.designation or "" }}
  • Joining Date: {{ doc.date_of_joining or "At the earliest" }}
  • Medical: You will be enrolled on the company medical insurance scheme after the completion of your sponsorship formalities.
  • Air-Ticket: You will be entitled for an air ticket allowance of AED {{ doc.custom_air_ticket_entitlement_cash_amount or "XXX" }}/- upon completion of {{ doc.custom_air_ticket_entitlement_duration or "12" }} months of continuous service subject to Company leave and air ticket policy.
  • Leave: As per company policy
  • Indemnity: As per UAE Labour Law
  • Probation Period: Six (6) Months as per U.A.E labor Law. During the probation period, you must prove to the satisfaction of the Company that you are fit for continued employment.
  • Hours & Place of Work: Normal hours of work will be per UAE Labour Law. You will be required to work for the sponsored company, as assigned by your Line Manager.
  • Termination of Contract: After successful completion of Probation period, the contract can be terminated either by the Employer by serving one month notice or by the employee by serving two months written notice.
  • Training: The Company provides training for the employees, as appropriate to their work assignments and shall bear the full cost, amounting to AED 5,000/-. However in the event of your decision to leave the Company within (2) years from the date of joining, the Company reserves the right to claim reimbursement of your training cost from your final settlement.
  • Salary Structure: Your salary structure per month is as shown below:
{% set ns= namespace(total = 0) %} {% for row in doc.offer_terms %} {% set value = (row.value or 0) %} {% if value|string|replace(',', '')|float %} {% set ns.total = ns.total + (value|string|replace(',', '')|float) %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
Particulars Amount
{{ row.offer_term }} {% if "provided" in value|string|lower %} {{ value }} {% else %} AED {{ value }} {% endif %}
Total Gross Salary AED {{ "%.2f"|format(ns.total) }}

This appointment is made subject to the approval of your employment visa by the local authorities.

You are required to sign two originals of this letter and return one signed original to us as a token of your acceptance of this offer, together with relevant documents to process your employment visa. This offer letter will be valid for 3 days since the issuance of this document.

Sincerely,

HR Department
{{ doc.company }}

Accepted and Agreed:

Name: {{ doc.applicant_name }}

Date: ___________________

Sign: ___________________

{% if letter_head.footer_image %}
{% endif %}
name: Worker OBR - Offer Letter
